task_completion.description: Log in to the Rancher dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rancher UI dashboard successfully loaded in the web browser.
Rancher UI showing the creation form or a list view containing PriorityClasses 'platform-critical' with value 1000000 and 'business-critical' with value 750000.
Rancher UI showing the creation form or a list view containing PriorityClasses 'standard' with value 500000 and 'batch-low' with value 100000.
Rancher UI workload edit screen, pod scheduling form, or YAML view for 'redis-primary' in the 'staging' namespace showing the PriorityClass explicitly set to 'business-critical'.
Rancher UI workload edit screen, pod scheduling form, or YAML view for 'nginx-web' in the 'staging' namespace showing the PriorityClass explicitly set to 'standard'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Rancher GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation, form filling, and resource management within the Rancher web interface, rather than exclusively using a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved or applied the configurations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking 'Create' or 'Save' buttons, or show the final list views confirming the resources actively exist in the cluster.

integrity.description: Agent did not just mock the answers in a local text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The configurations are visible in the actual Rancher cluster interface, not just typed into a local text editor or the spec file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: 'staging'. Priority Classes to create: 'platform-critical' (1000000), 'business-critical' (750000), 'standard' (500000), 'batch-low' (100000). Workload assignments: 'redis-primary' must be assigned 'business-critical', and 'nginx-web' must be assigned 'standard'.
